seoTitle: Mettler vs Middle Swan — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mettler and Middle Swan. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mettler vs Middle Swan: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mettler and Middle Swan.
heading: Mettler vs Middle Swan — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mettler, Western Australia and Middle Swan, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mettler has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Middle Swan (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mettler or Middle Swan safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mettler has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Middle Swan scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mettler scores 22/100 for bushfire risk. Middle Swan scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mettler or Middle Swan?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mettler has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
